name: The Changed World
description:
The world is not how it used to be...This world... is Changed.....

Get it because the name of the game is changed and like the world got changed so it's funny-

Wake up in an unknowingly beast-filled laboratory... Or... Be a lone scavenger entering the same facility, scrounging for loot. Become one of the elites, those who sealed themselves away to wait out the terror of the outside world, vowing to come back when it had left. You may be a guard, lost and surviving for the past few years within this wretched place, or a scientist, bent on exposing the transforming terrors to the outer world.

...Or you may even want to become one of them... begin as one of them, hunt down the scent of humanity and plunder it until it melds into the familiar smell of fur and goo, eternally damned to live as you stalk and track down your prey to ensure they meet the same fate as you, all by your instincts... Or is your damnation secretly a blessing? Something you actually enjoy, whether or not you are conscious to even think about what you're doing...

Fight, Flee, Explore, Exterminate, Live, Die, and finally... Give in.

This world is changed, and soon, you will be too.

IMPORTANT!!!!!! I should mention that this bot requires more of a... uh... kickstart, I guess? than other bots, you'll need to go into detail, and possibly edit or delete parts of it's messages to get it going.

Yeah.... soo.... been a while, like one or two weeks, exams have been WRECKING Me and I've been pretty slow, but I've been wanting to make this bot for a while, because I see all other changed bots are... not to be offensive to anyone... but pretty meh, this is more or less an experiment, if you're seeing this, that means the bot SHOULD function as intended, even with the dumptruck's load of lore and tokens packed into it.
creator: Veyl
